]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [

]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system maintains real-time synchronization with the physical asset through continuous data streams from live sensor measurements, ensuring the digital representation reflects the current physical state with minimal latency for critical operational monitoring."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system employs a Digital Shadow Reference Model as a UML class diagram to define the structure of contextual data traces, their aggregation, and abstraction for manufacturing applications, orchestrating the integration of physical data into the digital representation through standardized component interfaces and data flow mechanisms."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between physical and virtual components uses MQTT protocol for sensor data transmission; network topology, bandwidth, and redundancy specifications are not detailed in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Sensor data is streamed via MQTT protocol; Asset Administration Shells (AAS) are implemented."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system implements Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for standardized asset management, adheres to Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) using SysML for requirements and architecture modeling, and employs UML class diagrams for reference model definitions, with architecture description languages (ADLs) such as AADL, ACME, and MontiArc ensuring interoperability and component-based system descriptions."
]
